title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
